title: AI Eyes: Permission-first real-time senses for AI companions | Product Hunt
excerpt: AI Eyes explores what it would take for AI companions to share the moment with you—not through hidden monitoring, but through explicit, visible permission. Choose the exact screen or window, control screen, audio, and microphone independently, invite named companions, and pause or end sensing anytime. Built with Codex and GPT‑5.6, v0.1 proves the local-first capture, presence, and session-control layer; live semantic understanding is the next milestone.

sentences.zh: 选择确切的屏幕或窗口，独立控制屏幕、音频和麦克风，邀请指定的同伴，并随时暂停或结束感应。

content_html_zh: AI Eyes 探索人工智能伴侣如何与你分享这一刻——不是通过隐藏的监控，而是通过明确、可见的许可。 选择确切的屏幕或窗口，独立控制屏幕、音频和麦克风，邀请指定的同伴，并随时暂停或结束感应。 v0.1 采用 Codex 和 GPT-5.6 构建，证明了本地优先捕获、存在和会话控制层；实时语义理解是下一个里程碑。
